response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with roughly 19 years of experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, this role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows no recognized AI expertise, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at meaningful scale, and no track record of organization-level technical strategy, advising strategic customers, or influencing product direction. His AI exposure amounts to about a year of AI-agent tooling and MCP work at a small consultancy, which is far short of the 'recognized AI expert' bar this position demands.
strengths: Nearly two decades of broad, hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Founder-level entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) plus active open-source contributions and community teaching
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generation, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products at scale, the core requirement of this AI-strategy role
Career has remained at senior/staff IC level with no evidence of Director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory, or cross-org influence
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and AI experience is limited to roughly one year of tooling work

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap between senior IC roles and Director-level strategic scope
19 years of broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial background
